category_sources: Official tinc manual describes tinc as a VPN daemon that creates secure private networks with tunneling and encryption.
source_facts.description says it is a Virtual Private Network tool.
display_name_sources: Official tinc website and manual use the lowercase project name tinc.
docs_sources: Official tinc docs page links manuals, manpages, examples, and version-specific documentation.
Official tinc manual covers installation, configuration, running tinc, and technical/security information.
repo_sources: Official tinc repository page says to clone the public repository from https://tinc-vpn.org/git/tinc and labels GitHub/GitLab as clones.
tags_sources: Official tinc documentation describes tunneling, encryption, network interfaces, configuration, and security details.
